title: Product Update
summary: The new detail page is ready for staged rollout. Metrics and guardrails are already wired.

content.title: Ready
content.text: Core flows passed regression and the fallback page remains available.

content.title: Measure
content.text: Track click-through, completion rate, error rate, and support tickets.

content.title: Rollout
content.text: Start with internal traffic, then expand to ten percent after one stable day.

content.title: Owner
content.text: Product and engineering review the first dashboard snapshot together.
